case_title: CRESCENT MANOR, A LIMIED PARTNERSHIP vs. WHEELER, MADISON et al

docket_entries.description: RETURN OF EXECUTION FOR POSSESSION OF REAL PROPERTY ISSUED TO SAN FRANCISCO COUNTY, RETURNED AND FILED, SATISFIED AS TO REAL PROPERTY ONLY AS TO DEFENDANT WHEELER, MADISON
